missingPackageJson.message: TypeScript/JavaScript files were written but no package.json exists in the workspace root.

brokenScriptRef.message: Script "{script}" references "{file}" which does not exist on disk.

brokenMainField.message: package.json "main" field points to "{file}" which does not exist on disk.

missingDependency.message: Package "{package}" is imported in source files but not listed in package.json dependencies.

architectureConflict.message: File uses "{detected}" which conflicts with the committed architecture lock ("{locked}").

batchIncomplete.message: Declared file batch is incomplete: {remaining} file(s) not yet written.
